name: hdd_baseline
description: Healthy HDD — no degradation. All reads follow a normal distribution centered near real-world data-center HDD latency.
sources: DAMON 2021: measured 4KB random-read access latency ~7000 µs on HDD
OCP SAS/SATA Device Specification 2023: 4KB QD1 random read P50≤12ms, P99≤20ms
